channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell appeals for clemency from Trump as she declines to answer questions from lawmakers
item.description: House lawmakers have tried to interview Ghislaine Maxwell, but the former girlfriend and confidant of Jeffrey Epstein invoked her Fifth Amendment rights to avoid answering questions that would be incriminating.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie makes new video plea as missing mother’s ransom deadline nears
Masks emerge as symbol of Trump’s ICE crackdown and a flashpoint in Congress
